MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON JUN-27-2012 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT RAYMOND SMITH'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS

APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT SMITH, RAYMOND HEARING SET FOR JUN-27-2012 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, RAYMOND
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, RAYMOND SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SMITH, RAYMOND THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 241 SIXTH STREET #304B SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC
